## Changed surfaces

- [ ] Core schema/transpiler/validators (`packages/agents-core/`)

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm validate`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] Public-surface hygiene checked

## Public-surface hygiene

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, local-only paths, or private planning artifacts are included.
- [ ] Public docs do not mention internal study sources, benchmark collections, or prompt suites.
- [ ] Generated artifacts were produced from canonical source changes, not hand-edited only.
